_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: was not statistically significant when using head circumference Z scores directly from CDC charts (Standardized beta = 0.11; 95% CI = [−0.08, 0.29]; P = 0.25)
resourceName: Centers for Disease Control (CDC) growth charts
details: CDC charts showed no statistically significant relationship with developmental delay in NF1 patients (Standardized beta = 0.11; 95% CI = [-0.08, 0.29]; P = 0.25)
